text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I didn't even make it onto the
scoreboard... Staying the course in the Twinkle
Series sure is tough...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I... I have to get stronger!
choice_data_list: I'm behind you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I... I have to get stronger!
choice_data_list: I'm behind you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Knowing you have my back is really
reassuring!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I won't let you or anyone else who's
supporting me down!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll win the next one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of growing despondent, her loss has made
her more determined. I'm struck anew by just how
strong she is.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! No matter how many times I lose, I
won't let it bring me down!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm running so I can one day become a
legend like my dad...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It sucks that I lost, but I'm going to use this
disappointment as a springboard toward my
future success!
choice_data_list:
All right! Let's get down to training once we get
back!

All right! Let's get down to training once we get
back!
